meta.tagline: Western NY addiction-treatment · Newfane pin · Buffalo-metro break-out
meta.author: Aleksandar Spasevski
meta.doc_subtitle: Newfane core 100% owned · Brand canonical sitewide · GBP service-area swap to 9 WNY anchors · Service-page 10→5 consolidation · Location-page build/upgrade/redirect · Content firehose pause.

tldr: Niagara Recovery owns Western NY in Maps. On a 158-cell DataForSEO LocalDominator grid (Apr 30 2026), the brand is top-3 on 70.9% of cells for "alcohol detox near me", 70.3% for "alcohol rehab", and 60%+ for addiction-rehab / addiction-rehab-near-me / inpatient-rehab-near-me — at avg rank 3.0-3.5 across the entire WNY map. Eight outer-ring towns (Appleton, Ransomville, Cambria, Wilson, Youngstown, Olcott, Burt, Newfane) are at 100% top-3 across all 8 priority keywords; Barker holds 95.2% and Lockport 94.2%. Branded search converts at 17.1% CTR on 15,237 impressions/365d — the 20 branded queries pull 2,605 clicks/year and the brand variant "newfane recovery center" alone earns 85 clicks at 18.9% CTR. Q2 = converting what the brand already wins in Maps into site-level traffic: brand-canonical fix to recover the 41% search-demand bleed to the old name (363 vs 528 GBP searches), GBP service-area swap to declare 9 winnable anchor towns the site doesn't yet claim, service-page consolidation, and location-page architecture. The unlock is on-page + GBP discipline, not budget.

kpis.label: Map top-3 — alcohol detox near me
kpis.detail: 112 of 158 cells in the Western NY DataForSEO LocalDominator grid (Apr 30 2026) place Niagara in the top 3 of the Maps pack — at avg rank 3.13. Highest commercial-intent kw in the addiction-treatment vertical.

kpis.label: Map top-3 — alcohol rehab
kpis.detail: 111 of 158 cells top-3 at avg rank 2.99. Combined with "alcohol detox near me", Niagara is top-3 on 70%+ of WNY for both highest-intent alcohol-rehab queries.

kpis.label: Anchor towns 100% owned
kpis.detail: Newfane, Appleton, Ransomville, Cambria, Wilson, Youngstown, Olcott, and Burt are at 100% top-3 across all 8 priority keywords. Barker (95.2%) and Lockport (94.2%) round out a 10-town dominance ring. The Newfane pin's structural reach is wider than the on-site location pages declare.

kpis.label: Branded search CTR 365d
kpis.detail: 2,605 clicks on 15,237 impressions / 20 branded query variants. "newfane recovery center" alone earns 85 clicks at 18.9% CTR; "niagara rehab newfane ny" earns 28 clicks at 18.4% CTR / pos 1.3. Brand engine + 4.3★/47-review GBP carry intent reliably.

kpis.label: Brand demand recovery surface
kpis.detail: "Recovery Center of Niagara" pulled 363 GBP searches Dec-May vs "Niagara Recovery" variants at 528. Push 1 (sitewide brand canonical) consolidates the 41% leakage into the canonical entity — recovers a measurable share of branded-search clicks within 30-60d of Google reprocessing.

kpis.label: Anchor towns ready to declare on site
kpis.detail: 9 WNY anchor towns are already top-3 in Maps (Lockport 13c r1.4 · Clarence 40c r3.4 · Cambria · Pendleton · Sanborn · Wheatfield · Youngstown · Lewiston · N. Tonawanda) but the GBP service-area cap is filled with 13 redundant micros on 3 ZIPs. Swap is zero-budget; site location pages compound.

quarterly.note: Jan–Feb 2025 reflect a tracking outage (Jan = 5 sessions, Feb = 988); March recovered to 5,497.

keyword_buckets.posture: NOINDEX/410 ~300 off-vertical (porn-addiction 350K imp / vape-by-country / social-media addiction) + refresh 5 high-CTR with intake CTAs
BUILD Tonawanda + N. Tonawanda + Lewiston + Youngstown · UPGRADE Williamsville + Cheektowaga + Lockport + NF + Amherst · REDIRECT ~60 doorways
301 the 5 -in-newfane-ny dupes → 5 base · MedicalBusiness schema floor · SP rewrites (alcohol-detox / drug-detox / suboxone-MAT)

top_urls.lever: Push 5 CC-02 refresh + intake CTA (alcohol-purine-chart searcher)
Push 5 CC-02 refresh + family-crisis intake CTA
Push 1 BC-03 [phone number] fix + Push 3 SP-01 rewrite + schema
Push 1 BC-04 fabrication fix (NY 14215 → Newfane facility)
Push 4 LP-01 UPGRADE schema + ratings + NAP

positives: Top-3 Maps coverage of 70.9% (alcohol-detox-near-me), 70.3% (alcohol-rehab), 61.4% (inpatient-rehab-near-me), 60.8% (addiction-rehab and addiction-rehab-near-me) on a 158-cell Western NY grid — Niagara is the structural #1 entity for the commercial-intent core of the vertical
8 outer-ring towns at 100% top-3 across all 8 priority keywords: Newfane, Appleton, Ransomville, Cambria, Wilson, Youngstown, Olcott, Burt — plus Barker at 95.2% and Lockport at 94.2%

Brand engine 17.1% CTR on 15,237 imp/365d (2,605 clicks). "newfane recovery center" 85 clicks @ 18.9% CTR / pos 2.9 · "niagara rehab newfane ny" 28 clicks @ 18.4% CTR / pos 1.3 — long-tail brand recognition is healthy
4.3★/47-review GBP is the entity authority for Niagara County core; competitive landscape is beatable on rating: Renaissance (2.7★), Beacon (3.6★), Casa Di Vita (3 reviews), Pathways (3.3★)
GMB-tagged homepage = 3,429 clicks/365d at 6.92% CTR / avg pos 6.0 — single largest organic channel, with a fixable on-page floor that compounds directly
5 high-CTR blog assets already earning ~2,400 clicks/365d combined — refresh + intake CTA captures impression at zero net new content cost

9 WNY anchor towns ready to convert from Map wins to declared site presence — Lockport, Clarence, Cambria, Pendleton, Sanborn, Wheatfield, Youngstown, Lewiston, N. Tonawanda. Zero-budget GBP service-area swap consolidates 11 redundant micros into anchor declarations
negatives: Sitewide brand-canonical drift: 5/8 core pages title-tag as "Recovery Center of Niagara"; LocalBusiness JSON-LD ambiguous. 363 GBP searches Dec-May still route to the old name (41% of branded demand). Push 1 = single largest discoverable lever in Q2.
"[phone number]" placeholder LIVE on /services/alcohol-detoxification-services + -in-newfane-ny dupe (Webflow QA gap) — fix is a 10-minute edit + reprocess
10 /services/* URLs (5 base + 5 -in-newfane-ny dupes) for 3 clicks / 365d combined and 0 schema — service-page traffic floor is broken, schema floor is the unlock
Buffalo location page fabricates "our facility in Buffalo, NY 14215" — NAP-integrity risk for Maps (the only facility is at 2600 William St Newfane); Tonawanda + N. Tonawanda 404s
GBP photo count 6 = lowest of 12 WNY competitor GBPs scanned (competitors at 25-280 photos) — Push 2 brings to 25+ across 5 categories

670-post blog at 96% of impressions diluting toward off-vertical (porn-addiction 350K imp / vape-by-country / social-media addiction) — Push 5 NOINDEX/410s ~300 off-vertical posts, refreshes 5 high-CTR assets, and pauses the doorway-template firehose

levers.name: Brand canonical sitewide
levers.why: Title + footer + GBP all say "Niagara Recovery" but 5 of 8 core page titles (about / admissions / contact / treatments / areas-served) say "Recovery Center of Niagara" — LocalBusiness JSON-LD ambiguous + references niagararecovery.com/wp-content/* image (WordPress debris on Webflow). Search log confirms user confusion: "recovery center of niagara" pulled 363 GBP searches Dec-May vs new-brand variants at 528. This is the largest single discoverable lever in the quarter — directly recovers the 41% bleed.

actions.name: Sitewide title + H1 rewrite to "Niagara Recovery" canonical on 5 core pages (about / admissions / contact / treatments / areas-served)
LocalBusiness JSON-LD entity-name fix + WP-content image swap to live Webflow asset (homepage + about + admissions)
Kill "[phone number]" placeholder live on /services/alcohol-detoxification-services + Newfane dupe
Fix Buffalo location page fabrication ("our facility in Buffalo, NY 14215" → truthful "serving Buffalo metro from Newfane")

levers.outcome: 5/8 core pages re-title to canonical entity; all 3 sampled JSON-LD blocks pass validator.schema.org; 0 "[phone number]" literals on service pages; Buffalo page reads truthful NAP. Recovers 41% branded demand bleed within 30-60d of Google reprocessing.

levers.name: GBP service-area swap + photo blitz + Posts cadence
levers.why: GBP service area is at 20/20 cap with 13 entries on just 3 ZIPs (7 on 14094 Lockport, 3 on 14008 Appleton, 3 on 14172 Wilson) — 11 redundant micros consolidate to 2 keeps. That frees 9 slots for 9 WNY anchor towns where LD shows 100% coverage + top-3 rank but no entity declaration: Lockport (13c/r1.4), Clarence (40c/r3.4 — biggest break-out lever), Cambria, Pendleton, Sanborn, Wheatfield, Youngstown, Lewiston, N. Tonawanda. GBP photo count of 6 is lowest of 12 WNY competitors scanned.

actions.name: Service-area swap: drop 11 redundant micros (7×14094 Lockport hoods + 2×14008 Appleton + 2×14172 Wilson), add 9 anchor towns (Lockport + Clarence + Cambria + Pendleton + Sanborn + Wheatfield + Youngstown + Lewiston + N. Tonawanda)
Photo blitz 6 → 25 with category mix (5 facility / 5 staff / 5 treatment / 5 outdoor / 5 Newfane)
GBP Services tab audit + refinement of 10 service descriptions + add explicit Suboxone / MAT entries
GBP Posts M1 — 4 posts (brand-canonical / alcohol-detox / suboxone-MAT / Newfane facility tour)
GBP Posts M2 — 4 posts (drug-detox / benzo-detox / payor topics / insurance)
GBP Posts M3 — 4 posts (short-term residential / DBT / WNY break-out / brand-canonical reinforce)

levers.outcome: GBP shows 18 entries (9 KEEPs + 9 ADDs + 2 Q3 reserves); photo count 25+ with category mix; 12 cumulative Posts published over Q2. Maps cell coverage extends from Newfane-core into 9 WNY anchor towns by M3 reprocessing.

levers.name: Service-page consolidation + schema floor + 3 rewrites
levers.why: 10 /services/* URLs (5 base + 5 -in-newfane-ny near-dupes) combined for 3 clicks / 365d — the service-page traffic floor is broken. 0 schema on any service page. Two service URLs ship the literal "[phone number]" placeholder. SP-01 alcohol-detox = 790/mo Bing volume (highest single-modality demand); SP-02 drug-detox = 6,600/mo Google Ads volume (largest captured); SP-03 suboxone-MAT = 62 GBP searches Dec-May (top non-brand demand) + 1,900/mo "suboxone doctor".

actions.name: 301 the 5 -in-newfane-ny service-page dupes to the 5 base /services URLs (content-merge winning body copy)
Deploy MedicalBusiness + Service schema on all 5 base /services pages + treatments hub + short-term residential
Alcohol-detox page rewrite (790/mo Bing vol) — 932w → 1500w + schema + meta_description + intake CTA + FAQ
Drug-detox page rewrite (6,600/mo Google Ads vol) — 733w → 1500w + per-modality split (opioids / amphetamines / cocaine / poly-drug) + FAQ
Suboxone-MAT NEW page build (/services/suboxone-mat-program) — 1500w + MedicalBusiness/Service schema + payor info + intake CTA (gates on Owner Ask 3 clinical confirm)

levers.outcome: 10 service URLs consolidate to 5 canonical + new suboxone-MAT page = 6 service URLs total; all carry valid schema; SP-01 captures 790/mo Bing detox volume; SP-03 captures 62 GBP searches + 1,900/mo "suboxone doctor". Service-page combined clicks 3/365d → 50/M3 target.

levers.name: Location-page architecture (build / upgrade / redirect)
levers.why: 94 /locations/* pages generate 16 clicks / 365d combined. Williamsville (986w) + Cheektowaga (679w) have substantive content but zero schema, no ratings, no NAP — failing to rank at 60-80% LD coverage. Tonawanda + N. Tonawanda return 404 (matches Buffalo-metro 0/7 cell black hole). Lockport / NF / Amherst = 276-278w thin doorways. ~60 best-/most-trusted-/dependable-/premium- doorway URLs identical to Surfpoint + Arms Acres patterns.

actions.name: Williamsville UPGRADE — add MedicalBusiness schema + ratings + NAP + service-link tightening (already 986w content)
Cheektowaga UPGRADE — same pattern as LP-01 (already 679w)
Tonawanda BUILD — currently 404; ~1000w + MedicalBusiness schema + drive directions + service links
N. Tonawanda BUILD — currently 404; ~1000w + schema (50-100% LD cov, rank 5-7)
Lewiston BUILD — ~800w + schema (100% LD cov rank 4-5, low-effort entity claim)
Youngstown BUILD — ~800w + schema (100% LD cov rank 1.3, dominant but no on-site landing)
Lockport UPGRADE thin (276w → 1000w) — entity is dominant in LD (13c/100%/r1.4), on-site landing is the mismatch
Niagara Falls UPGRADE thin (278w → 1000w)
Amherst UPGRADE thin (276w → 1000w)
REDIRECT ~60 best-/most-trusted-/dependable-/premium- doorway URLs to anchor city pages (small-level 301s per fill-not-kill policy)

levers.outcome: 9 substantive location pages live with schema + NAP + service links by M3; ~60 doorway URLs return 301 to anchor city pages; /locations/* combined clicks 16/365d → 80/M3 target. Buffalo-metro Maps black hole closed via Tonawanda + N. Tonawanda + Cheektowaga + Williamsville builds.

levers.name: Content cleanup + cannibal consolidation + production-firehose pause
levers.why: 670-post blog at 96% of impressions diluting topical authority toward off-vertical content (porn-addiction 350K imp / vape-by-country / social-media addiction) and Newfane-only modifiers, not WNY break-out terrain. Non-branded discovery collapsed 87% even as 22 new PAA blogs + 9 new suburb-doorway pages shipped 2026-04-15 → 2026-05-18. Without CC-03 owner-ask pause, LP-10 doorway redirects become a perpetual cleanup cycle. Off-page rotation switched from SEO Neo / AI Articles stack to disavow + Tier-1 citations + earned-link work per 2026-05-13 program halt.

actions.name: NOINDEX/410 the ~300 off-vertical high-impression posts (porn-addiction 350K imp / vape-by-country / social-media addiction etc.)

Refresh 5 already-earning blog assets (~2,400 clicks/365d combined) with intake CTAs + Article schema (alcohol-and-gout / wake-up-drunk / hydroxyzine-withdrawal / legal-drugs-feel-good / break-porn-addiction)
OWNER ASK — pause the suburb-doorway production firehose (Attica / E. Oakville / Renowned / Famous / Leading template stream) for Q2 duration
Sitewide internal-linking pass on KEEP cohort (~370 surviving posts) — add 1-2 internal links to /services/* + /locations/* per anchor-text spec
Disavow.txt build — spam-score 43 (vs competitors 3-24) PBN-pattern cluster (SEO Anomaly / SEO Cartel / site20 signature pending Aaron Gruenke recognition pass)
Tier-1 institutional citations — claim/submit SAMHSA findtreatment.gov + OASAS provider directory + NIAAA + 211 WNY + Niagara County mental-health resource (10 batch)
WNY earned-link / local PR pitch — Buffalo News health vertical / WGRZ / WNY Refresh (1-2 editorial mentions over Q2)
LD recurring scan setup — 6 anchor coords × 8 priority kws weekly (Newfane / Lockport / Williamsville / N. Tonawanda / Buffalo / Niagara Falls)
M3 strategy close-out scorecard — cross-source rank + Maps + GSC + cannibal in one document

levers.outcome: ~300 off-vertical blog posts NOINDEX/410'd; 5 high-CTR assets have intake CTAs at 3 placements + Article schema; doorway pipeline paused (no new template URLs ship in Q2); disavow.txt deployed against spam-43 tail; 10 Tier-1 citations live; LD weekly scan running. Non-branded clicks 47/30d → 200/30d M3 target.

deliverables.label: Q2 2026 Tasks (FINAL — SEO Neo + AI Articles filtered)

owner_asks: Approve "Niagara Recovery" as the canonical brand entity for the website's title, header, footer, JSON-LD schema, and all marketing assets going forward (gates Push 1 BC-01 through BC-04 — recovers 41% branded demand bleed).
Decide SAB vs storefront posture for the GBP — HQDM recommends storefront (24/7 inpatient supports it; entity-graph signals weaken under SAB).
Confirm 4 credentialing claims (CARF / LegitScript / SAMHSA / OASAS) + Suboxone clinical offering — gates Push 3 SP-03 suboxone-MAT page build + Push 4 location-page hasCredential fields.

Approve pause on suburb-doorway production firehose for Q2 duration (the Attica / E. Oakville / Renowned / Famous / Leading template stream) — without this, Push 4 LP-10 doorway redirects become a perpetual cleanup cycle.
Press Release task stuck in Asana since 2025-10-11 (7 months) — ship or close out. Either path is fine; the unresolved state isn't.

gsc_organic_trend.headline: Branded engine stable (17.1% CTR / 15,237 imp/365d) — non-branded discovery collapsed 87% in last 30d window
gsc_organic_trend.annotation_text: Source: GSC live API — 365d daily window aggregated to monthly buckets via 30/90/180/365-day period deltas. May 2026 partial (first 18 days through 2026-05-18). The Apr-May 2026 drop is non-branded; branded search holds steady at 17.1% CTR. The 670-post blog continues publishing through the collapse.
gsc_organic_trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 partial — first 18 days at trailing pace.

events.label: Apr 2026 — production firehose continues despite collapse

snapshot.eyebrow: HQDM Search Intelligence · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.title: Niagara Recovery
snapshot.subtitle: Q2 2026 · Western NY · Newfane pin · Client Snapshot
snapshot.footer: Client snapshot · Q2 2026 · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.exec_html: Niagara Recovery is the structural #1 entity for addiction-treatment Maps across Western NY. On a 158-cell DataForSEO LocalDominator grid (Apr 30 2026), the brand is top-3 on 70.9% of cells for alcohol detox near me, 70.3% for alcohol rehab, and 60%+ for the rest of the priority-keyword set — at avg rank 3.0–3.5 across the whole map. Eight outer-ring towns (Newfane, Appleton, Ransomville, Cambria, Wilson, Youngstown, Olcott, Burt) are at 100% top-3 across all 8 priority queries; Lockport (94%) and Barker (95%) round out a 10-town dominance ring. Branded search clicks through at 17.1% on 15,237 imp/365d. Q2 is about converting what the brand already wins in Maps into site-level traffic: brand-canonical fix to recover the 41% search bleed to the old name, a Google Business service-area swap to declare 9 winnable anchor towns, service-page consolidation, and location-page architecture.

line.title: Maps Engine · Brand-Search Clicks · Monthly (Q4 2025 → Apr 2026)
line.caption: Brand-search clicks are the on-site signal of the Google Business / Maps engine — people who see the Newfane profile (11,019 GBP profile views Dec→May 2026, 90% from Google Search panels + 10% from the Maps app) come back to search the brand. The line has held in the ~200/mo range across Q4 2025 → Q1 2026, stable while the rest of the site's organic discovery was retreating. GMB-tagged sessions in GA4 reinforce it: GMB drove 45.8% of all organic sessions in the last 30 days, up from 21.1% trailing 365 days.

snapshot.boxes_reading_html: The Maps engine is the clean signal — Niagara is the structural #1 entity for addiction-treatment across Western NY, with 759 top-3 cells vs 230 for the next provider. The branded search engine routes 2,605 clicks/year at a healthy 17.1% CTR. Q2 levers convert this structural position into more site-declared territory and more on-page surface for the brand to compound on.

focus.title: Brand-canonical sitewide
focus.body: Fix the brand-canonical signal across the site so the brand engine isn’t fighting itself.

focus.title: GBP service-area swap
focus.body: Swap the Google Business service area off the capped ZIP set and add a photo blitz + posting cadence.

focus.title: Service-page consolidation
focus.body: Consolidate overlapping service pages, set a schema floor, and rewrite the three priority pages.

focus.title: Location-page architecture
focus.body: Build, upgrade, or redirect location pages into a clean architecture that supports the outer-ring towns.

maps.title: Maps Dominance · Top Keywords
maps.note_html: Across the 158-cell Western NY grid, Niagara Recovery places in the top 3 Maps results on the majority of cells for every commercial-intent priority keyword. The two highest-volume queries (alcohol-detox-near-me and alcohol-rehab) hold 70%+ top-3 coverage.

anchor_towns_table.title: Anchor Towns · 100% Top-3 Owned
anchor_towns_table.note_html: These are the towns where Niagara is already structurally #1-3 in the Maps pack. The Q2 plan converts this Map presence into site-declared entity presence — the GBP service-area swap declares Lockport, Clarence, Cambria, Pendleton, and 5 more anchor towns; the location-page architecture builds the on-site landings to match.

competitors.title: Competitor Movement · Maps
competitors.note_html: Niagara is the #1 Maps entity in addiction-treatment Western NY by a wide margin — 759 top-3 cells across the 9 priority queries × 158-cell grid, more than 3× the next provider (Casa Di Vita at 220). Three of the rows above are intent-mismatched (medical/elder rehab and physical therapy), included for reference; the comparable addiction-treatment competitors are Renaissance, Pathways, Casa Di Vita, and Caz Recovery — all beatable on rating + topical density. Lower avg rank is better.
